close_reason: Implemented hash-based staleness detection in .envrc using SHA256 hashes stored in .turnkey-deps-hashes
description: Replace timestamp-based checks in .envrc with hash-based checks. Store input file hashes in .turnkey-deps-hashes and compare to detect when regeneration is needed. More reliable than -nt timestamp comparisons.
title: Implement hash-based staleness detection for deps regeneration
